mapper.insert:
SELECT 'EXP-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(SEQ_EXPORT_ID.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EXPORT_MASTER ( EXPORT_ID, EXPORT_NUMBER, MEM_ID, STATUS, REG_DATE, EXPORTER_NAME, REP_NAME, BIZ_REG_NO, BUYER_ID_NO, CUSTOMS_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDRESS, DEST_COUNTRY, LOADING_PORT, GOODS_LOC, CARGO_MGMT_NO, BONDED_REP_NAME, CARRIER_NAME, VESSEL_NAME, LOADING_LOC, CONT_NO, EXCHANGE_RATE, CURRENCY_CODE, PAY_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DECL_AMT, FREIGHT_AMT, INSURANCE_AMT, HS_CODE, ITEM_NAME_DECLARED, ITEM_NAME_TRADE, BRAND_NAME, TOTAL_WEIGHT, TOTAL_PACK_CNT, QTY, QTY_UNIT, INVOICE_NO, ORIGIN_COUNTRY, MODEL_NAME, UNIT_PRICE, DCL_TYPE, TRANS_MODE, EXPORT_KIND, PAYMENT_METHOD, INCOTERMS, TRANSPORT_MODE, CONTAINER_MODE, GOODS_TYPE, REFUND_APPLICANT, OFFICER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_EXPORT_ID.CURRVAL, #{exportNumber}, #{memId}, #{status}, SYSDATE, #{exporterName}, #{repName}, #{bizRegNo}, #{buyerIdNo}, #{customsId}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerAddress}, #{destCountry}, #{loadingPort}, #{goodsLoc}, #{cargoMgmtNo}, #{bondedRepName}, #{carrierName}, #{vesselName}, #{loadingLoc}, #{contNo}, #{exchangeRate}, #{currencyCode}, #{payAmount}, #{totalDeclAmt}, #{freightAmt}, #{insuranceAmt}, #{hsCode}, #{itemNameDeclared}, #{itemNameTrade}, #{brandName}, #{totalWeight}, #{totalPackCnt}, #{qty}, #{qtyUnit}, #{invoiceNo}, #{originCountry}, #{modelName}, #{unitPrice}, #{dclType}, #{transMode}, #{exportKind}, #{paymentMethod}, #{incoterms}, #{transportMode}, #{containerMode}, #{goodsType}, #{refundApplicant}, ( SELECT MEM_ID FROM ( SELECT A.MEM_ID FROM MEMBER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OFFICER_ID FROM EXPORT_MASTER UNION ALL SELECT OFFICER_ID FROM IMPORT_MASTER ) B ON A.MEM_ID = B.OFFICER_ID WHERE A.MEM_ROLE = 'OFFICER' GROUP BY A.MEM_ID ORDER BY COUNT(B.OFFICER_ID) ASC, A.MEM_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXPORT_MASTER SET STATUS = #{status}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE EXPORT_NUMBER = #{exportNumber}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, C.FILE_ID, C.REF_ID, C.REF_TYPE, C.FILE_NAME, C.FILE_PATH, C.SAVE_NAME, C.FILE_TYPE, C.UPLOAD_DATE, C.DEL_YN FROM ( SELECT IM.*, AD.RISK_SCORE, AD.RISK_COMMENT, AD.CHECK_DATE, AD.DOC_COMMENT
,AD.CHECK_ID ,AD.RISK_RESULT ,AD.DOC_SCORE
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IM.EXPORT_ID ORDER BY AD.CHECK_DATE DESC NULLS LAST) as RN FROM EXPORT_MASTER IM LEFT OUTER JOIN AI_DOC_CHECK AD ON IM.EXPORT_NUMBER = AD.DOC_NUMBER WHERE IM.EXPORT_ID = #{exportId} ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTACHMENTS C ON (A.EXPORT_NUMBER = C.REF_ID AND C.DEL_YN = 'N') WHERE A.RN = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE EXPORT_MASTER SET OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, ASSIGN_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE EXPORT_ID = #{exportId}
UPDATE EXPORT_MASTER SET DELAY_YN = 'Y' WHERE STATUS != 'ACCEPTED' AND SUBMIT_DATE <= SYSDATE - 3 AND (DELAY_YN = 'N' OR DELAY_YN IS NULL)
